title: delphinium bicolor var. cognatum
intro: Delphinium bicolor var. cognatum, also known as the Cognatum Delphinium, is a perennial flowering plant species belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to have wound-healing effects. In terms of health benefits, Delphinium bicolor var. cognatum has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and poultices, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies for medicinal purposes.
